steps.title: Divide both sides by N
steps.content:
Start with $P = N(34 - C)$. Divide both sides by $N$ to isolate the expression containing $C$:

$$\frac{P}{N} = 34 - C$$

steps.title: Rearrange to solve for C
steps.content:
To isolate $C$, rearrange by moving $C$ to the left side and $34$ to the right side (equivalently: subtract 34 from both sides, then multiply by $-1$):

$$C = 34 - \frac{P}{N}$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
